flashcards.front: What is the primary function of the Data Link Layer?
What is the difference between connectionless and connection-oriented services?
flashcards.back: Connectionless services do not require an acknowledgement, while connection-oriented services do.

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the trailer in a data frame?
What is the purpose of flow control in the Data Link Layer?
What is the difference between HDLC and PPP?
flashcards.back: HDLC is a bit-oriented protocol, while PPP is a byte-oriented protocol.
